name: Wilted Lettuce
recipeIngredient: 5 Cups Bibb Lettuce, torn into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Put lettuce and onions in a salad bowl.
2. Fry bacon crisp and cool on paper towel.
3. Cool the bacon grease slightly, then add brown sugar, vinegar, water, salt, and dry mustard to it.
4. Pour the dressing over the lettuce and onion mixture.
5. Sprinkle crumbled bacon on top.
6. Serve immediately.
Serves: 6
Source: "Mountain Measures", Junior League of Charleston, WV. ed. 1974
